title: Lightning LNURL-pay Handler Config
description: Configuration for the com.musqet.lnurl-pay payment handler. The Business advertises an LNURL-pay endpoint or a Lightning Address; the Platform executes the LUD-06 flow to obtain a BOLT11. The endpoint MUST support LUD-12 comments with commentAllowed >= 64.

lightning_address.description: Lightning Address in the form user@host. Resolves to https://{host}/.well-known/lnurlp/{user}. The resolved endpoint MUST support LUD-12 comments with commentAllowed >= 64.

lnurl.description: LNURL-pay endpoint — either bech32-encoded (lnurl1...) or a direct https:// URL. The endpoint MUST support LUD-12 comments with commentAllowed >= 64.

display_name.description: Optional human-readable label for payment-method UI.
